nasb.text: And He answered and said, “It is not good to take the children’s bread and throw it to the dogs.”

esv.text: And he answered, “It is not right to take the children’s bread and throw it to the dogs.”

cnv.text: 耶穌回答：“拿兒女的餅丟給小狗吃是不好的。”

ccb.text: 耶稣答道：“把儿女的食物丢给狗吃，不合适。”

csbs.text: 耶稣回答说：“拿儿女的饼扔给小狗，是不合宜的。”
